title: Peppery Crispy German Potato Stir-fry
description: This dish combines crisp and peppery flavors with a touch of ferment for a romantic twist on traditional German potato dishes.
instructions: Peel and dice the potatoes into bite-sized pieces. Chop the onion finely.
Mince garlic cloves and add them to a large skillet with olive oil over medium heat.
Add chopped onions, pepper corns, and diced potatoes to the skillet, stirring occasionally for about 5 minutes until slightly browned.
Pour in balsamic vinegar and white wine, reduce heat to low and simmer for another 10-15 minutes or until most of the liquid is absorbed. Taste and adjust seasoning if needed.
If using brandy, add it now along with any additional fermenting agent like sauerkraut juice, and continue cooking until the mixture thickens and flavors meld together.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs.
